title: RunnerGroup
description: A versioned runtime bundle that supplies pinned images, built-in primitives, custom primitive extensions, and execution defaults for validations or protocol workbenches.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

version.description: Semver version of this runner group.

runtime.description: Primary execution runtime used by the runner group.

imageRef.description: Pinned image or runtime artifact reference used by this runner group.

imageDigestPinned.description: Whether the image or artifact reference is digest-pinned.

builtInPrimitives.description: Primitive names bundled with this runner group.

customPrimitiveRefs.description: References to custom primitive definitions or external bundles.

dependencyProfiles.description: Dependency profile names loaded by the runner group.

networkPolicyRef.description: Optional network policy applied to the runner environment.
